title: lasianthus caeruleus
intro: Lasianthus caeruleus, also known as the blue lasianthus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. It is a shrub native to Southeast Asia, prized for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus caeruleus include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to relieve symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions.
